jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Learning Platform
jobs.content: <p>Own the learning-platform that anchors Duolingo&#39;s mobile language-learning consumer app — the spaced-repetition exercise pipeline, the Duolingo English Test high-stakes proficiency exam, and the gamified streaks engine that hundreds of millions of learners hit every day.</p><ul><li>Distributed-systems / mobile-services experience required</li></ul>

jobs.title: Business Development and Partnerships Lead, LATAM
jobs.content: <p>Lead Duolingo&rsquo;s LATAM business-development and partnerships across Brazil, Mexico, and the Spanish-speaking Andes — Duolingo for Schools, Duolingo English Test institutional channels, and Duolingo Math / Music verticals targeting K–12 districts and university-prep cohorts.</p>
